videos.headline: TCU's Hail Mary gives Horned Frogs first half-lead
videos.description: Kenny Hill throws 38 yards to WR Jalen Reagor in the end zone for the touchdown to grab the lead at the end of the half.

videos.headline: Snell runs 10 yards for a TCU TD
videos.description: True freshman Kenedy Snell scores for the Horned Frogs first touchdown of the game.

videos.headline: SMU's Freeman gets his second rushing TD
videos.description: On the Mustang's second possession, Ke'Mon Freeman runs up the middle for his second 1st quarter touchdown.

videos.headline: Hill connects with Nixon for the TD
videos.description: Kenny Hill throws an 11-yard pass to Shaun Nixon in the end zone for a TCU touchdown.

videos.headline: TCU's Hill hands off to Anderson for a TD
videos.description: RB Darius Anderson runs 4 yards for the Horned Frog's touchdown.

videos.headline: SMU's Freeman races down to the field to score
videos.description: Ke'Mon Freeman speeds through the middle for a 37-yard touchdown at the end of the 3rd quarter.

videos.headline: TCU's Hill throws fourth TD of the game
videos.description: Kenny Hill delivers a 37-yard pass to WR KaVontae Turpin to make it 49-29 TCU lead.

videos.headline: TCU's Howard scores 4th quarter pick-six
videos.description: SMU's QB Kenny Hicks throws an interception which is returned by TCU's LB Travin Howard for a 20-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: SMU Hicks throws long for a TD
videos.description: Ben Hicks throws 58 yards to Trey Quinn for a SMU touchdown early in the first quarter.

videos.headline: TCU's Hill delivers to Snell
videos.description: Kenedy Snell jets down the field for 71-yards for his second touchdown of the game.

videos.headline: Anderson breezes to the end zone for a Horned Frogs TD
videos.description: Darius Anderson gets his second touchdown of the day with a 38-yard run.

videos.headline: SMU's Hicks connects with Proche for a TD
videos.description: Ben Hick throws long to Jame Proche for a 61-yard touchdown.
